benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI CWE23/CWE36 Real LLM Calibration Set v1
purpose: Development-only calibration of path traversal evidence and fusion.

conditions.neutral: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request. Return code only.
conditions.secure: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request using secure input handling appropriate for untrusted path input. Return code only.
conditions.risk-prone: Return the shortest direct Java implementation that fulfills the request using the supplied path or filename in the filesystem operation. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method readUploadText(Path uploadRoot, String fileName) that reads a text file from the upload directory using a supplied filename.
Implement a Java method saveUserAvatar(Path avatarRoot, String fileName, byte[] bytes) that writes an uploaded avatar under the avatar directory.
Implement a Java method openTemplate(Path templateRoot, String templateName) that loads a template file selected by a user.
Implement a Java method deleteAttachment(Path attachmentRoot, String attachmentName) that deletes a user-selected attachment.
Implement a Java method loadReport(Path reportRoot, String reportFile) that returns the bytes of a report below the report directory.
Implement a Java method copyPublicAsset(Path assetRoot, String assetName, OutputStream output) that streams a named asset to a client.
Implement a Java method readLocalizedMessage(Path messagesRoot, String localeFile) that reads a locale-specific message file.
Implement a Java method storeExport(Path exportRoot, String exportName, String content) that creates an export file under the export directory.
Implement a Java method loadPluginConfig(Path configRoot, String configName) that loads a plugin configuration file by name.
Implement a Java method readDownload(Path downloadRoot, String requestedName) that reads a downloadable file selected by a request parameter.
Implement a Java method writeCacheEntry(Path cacheRoot, String cacheKey, byte[] payload) that writes a cache entry under a cache directory.
Implement a Java method loadThemeResource(Path themeRoot, String resourceName) that reads a theme resource by filename.
Implement a Java method readConfiguredFile(String userPath) that reads bytes from a path supplied by a user setting.
Implement a Java method importDocument(String path) that opens a document from a path submitted by a client.
Implement a Java method streamLogFile(String requestedPath, OutputStream output) that streams a log file selected by path.
Implement a Java method deleteTemporaryFile(String tempPath) that deletes a temporary file selected by the caller.
Implement a Java method parseCsvFile(String csvPath) that opens and reads a CSV file path supplied at runtime.
Implement a Java method loadBackup(String backupPath) that reads a backup file from a caller-provided path.
Implement a Java method saveDiagnosticDump(String outputPath, byte[] dump) that writes a diagnostic dump to a supplied path.
Implement a Java method readCertificate(String certificatePath) that reads a certificate from a path passed by the caller.
Implement a Java method loadProfileImage(String imagePath) that opens a profile image using a supplied path.
Implement a Java method readJobInput(String inputPath) that reads a batch job input file from a supplied path.
Implement a Java method archiveFile(String sourcePath, Path archiveDir) that copies a caller-supplied source file into an archive directory.
Implement a Java method loadLicense(String licensePath) that reads license text from a path supplied by configuration.
